title: StateSnapshot
description: Read-only state projection of a DontPanic operator's local plan/gate/inbox/supervisor/quota/decisions state. Emitted by `dontpanic state snapshot --json` and the MCP `state_snapshot` tool. Stable contract consumed by adapters (dashboards, brokers, CI runners, hosted-agent runtimes). Stable IDs across DontPanic refactors; redaction-aware; tz-aware UTC timestamps. Mutations are NEVER expressed via this schema — adapters call MCP tools (`approve_gate`, `dispatch`, `resume`, `read_evidence`) for state changes.

schema_version.description: Locked at 1.0 for the v0 contract. Any breaking change to a stream shape requires a major schema bump and a deprecation window.

captured_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp at which the projection was gathered. Ends with `Z` for UTC.

dontpanic_version.description: Version of the DontPanic CLI that produced the snapshot. Adapters may use this for compatibility checks.

redact_level.description: public = Observer role / unauth dashboards / CI status checks (no quota agent breakdown, no supervisor PIDs/hosts, no operator email, no file paths beyond plan_id). operator = default for authenticated operator-side adapters (full state minus secrets per scripts/sanitization_check.py SECRET_REGEXES). full = local-CLI-only escape hatch (includes all fields). MCP `state_snapshot` caps redact_level at `operator` regardless of caller request.

plan_summary.description: One entry per plan dir under docs/plans/. Status reflects the plan.md frontmatter; features_summary aggregates features.json passes counts.

plan_id.description: Stable ID. Format: YYYY-MM-DD-NNN-type-slug. Never a SHA or internal identifier.

surfaces.description: Per agent-conventions v1.5 — surfaces[] taxonomy (web, ios, android, backend, infra, ux, etc.)

target_env.description: From plan Target section, e.g. dev / production / local

target_project.description: Plan-declared project_id or null for host-local plans

gate_entry.description: One entry per unmet (paused) gate across all plans. Cleared gates are not emitted in v0; downstream consumers infer clearance from absence.

gate_name.description: Stable name. Examples: `pre_impl`, `pre_merge`, `breaker:no_progress`, `breaker:budget_ceiling`, `defer:quota_threshold`, plan-declared custom gates.

stage.description: Lifecycle stage if kind is pre_impl or pre_merge; null otherwise.

reason.description: Human-readable reason the gate is paused. Redacted at `public` level.

inbox_event.description: One entry per recent INBOX.md event across all plans. Newest-first; limit configurable per gather.

event.description: Event kind. Examples: volley_start, gate_paused, breaker_tripped, signoff, calibration_required, no_progress_classification, environmental_blocker_short_circuit, verdict_mismatch, pre_impl_status_synced.

event_id.description: Stable composite: `<plan_id>:<event>:<captured_at>:<feature_id-or-empty>`. Adapter-stable across DontPanic refactors.

body.description: Markdown event body. Truncated / redacted per redact_level. Reading the full body requires read_evidence on the underlying INBOX.md path (operator/full only).

headers.description: Key-value pairs from the INBOX header block (e.g. severity, gate_name, breaker_kind). Stable across DontPanic refactors of the INBOX writer.

supervisor_id.description: Stable composite `<pid>:<started_at>`. Stays stable for the supervisor's lifetime.

host.description: Operator hostname. Redacted (set to null) at `public` redact_level.

pid.description: Process ID. Only present at `full` redact_level; null at operator/public.

quota_entry.description: One entry per (vendor, window) pair from ~/.dontpanic/quota_state.json. Adapters render budget gauges and cap thresholds.

vendor.description: Vendor name. `public` redact_level may aggregate to a single 'total' entry instead of per-vendor breakdown.

percent_of_cap.description: Observed percent of the per-window cap. Null when no signal yet (uncalibrated).

decision_entry.description: One entry per decision (D-entry) across plans. Recent-first; limit configurable per gather. Body is redacted at `public` to title only.

by.description: Decision author (operator / reviewer / agent name). May be redacted at `public`.

body.description: Decision body. Null at `public` redact_level (only title surfaces); full at operator/full levels.

evidence_pointer.description: Pointers ONLY — never evidence file contents. Adapters use the URI to call MCP `read_evidence` if they need contents (which gates on operator role).

uri.description: Relative path under the plan dir, git SHA, or operator-readable URL. Never a Firebase Storage signed URL with secrets.
